plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**Root Cause:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts` — the `processItems` loop uses `i < items.length - 1`, which stops one index short and always skips the last element.

**The Fix:** A single-character change on one line:

```typescript
// Before (buggy)
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {

// After (fixed)
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

**Impact:**
- Only `src/utils.ts` needs to change
- Two currently-failing tests will pass after the fix: the "all items" test (3-element array missing last element) and the single-item test (no items processed at all)
- All other tests (empty array, `sum` function) continue to pass

**Verification:** Run `npm test` (Vitest) — all tests in `tests/utils.test.ts` should pass.
